entry.title: BILL024(26) (Honolulu): Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.
entry.content:
AUTHORIZING THE ISSUANCE AND SALE OF GENERAL OBLIGATION BONDS AND BOND ANTICIPATION NOTES OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU IN A MAXIMUM PRINCIPAL AMOUNT EQUAL TO THE AGGREGATE OF THE AMOUNTS APPROPRIATED IN THE CAPITAL BUDGET ORDINANCE OF SAID CITY AND COUNTY FOR THE FISCAL YEAR ENDING JUNE 30, 2027, AND SPECIFIED IN SAID ORDINANCE TO BE FINANCED FROM THE PROCEEDS OF THE SALE OF SUCH BONDS AND TO BE EXPENDED FROM THE GENERAL IMPROVEMENT BOND FUND, THE HIGHWAY IMPROVEMENT BOND FUND, SOLID WASTE IMPROVEMENT BOND FUND, THE HOUSING DEVELOPMENT SPECIAL FUND OR THE TAXABLE GENERAL IMPROVEMENT BOND FUND.

The bill authorizes the issuance and sale of general obligation bonds and bond anticipation notes of the City and County of Honolulu in a maximum principal amount equal to the aggregate of the amounts of general obligation bonds appropriated in the capital budget ordinance for Fiscal Year 2027.

Latest action: Deadline for Mayor to return Bill is 06/23/26. Transmitted to Mayor for his approval or otherwise.

View on the council site

entry.title: New: BFED-61 Reso 26-100 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
RESOLUTION 26-100, AUTHORIZING A TAX-EXEMPT LEASE-PURCHASE AGREEMENT WITH TD EQUIPMENT FINANCE, INC., FOR THE JOHNSON CONTROLS, INC., ENERGY PERFORMANCE CONTRACT (BFED-61)

entry.title: New: BILL042(26) (Honolulu) — INTRO
entry.content:
TO AMEND A PORTION OF THE STATE LAND USE DISTRICT BOUNDARY MAP (KAHUKU QUADRANGLE) FROM THE AGRICULTURAL DISTRICT TO THE URBAN DISTRICT FOR CERTAIN LANDS SITUATED IN THE KOʻOLAU LOA DEVELOPMENT PLAN AREA, LĀ‘IE, OʻAHU, HAWAIʻI.

Latest action: Introduced.

View on the council site
